name: Platter of Fennel, Red Pepper, Beetroot, Wate
recipeIngredient: 1 Fennel Bulb, trimmed and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange watercress on a platter.
2. Toss fennel with a squeeze of lemon juice to prevent discoloration.
3. Arrange the fennel and remaining vegetables (red bell peppers and cooked beets) on the platter, along with the olives.
4. Dress generously with olive oil.
5. Garnish with wedges of lemon for serving.
